rule_metadata.name: AuroraStealer_March_2023
rule_metadata.author: RussianPanda
rule_metadata.description: Detects an unobfuscated AuroraStealer March update binary

rules.rule_text:
rule AuroraStealer_March_2023
{
	meta:
		author = "RussianPanda"
		description = "Detects an unobfuscated AuroraStealer March update binary"
		date = "3/23/2023"

	strings:
		$b1 = { 48 8D 0D ?? ?? 05 00 E8 ?? ?? EF FF }
		$ftp = "FOUND FTP"

	condition:
		all of them
}
